pattern: (?i)(?:^\s*(?:no[,.! ]|nope\b|not that\b|wrong[,. ])|that'?s (?:wrong|incorrect|not right)|don'?t use\b|stop using\b|i (?:said|asked|told you)\b|instead,? use\b|use \S{1,40} instead|you (?:misunderstood|got it wrong))
message: the user corrected you. Act on the correction. Persist a lesson only if the user explicitly asks, task-retrospective is armed, or the candidate independently passes the durable project-specific write test; run write-gate before any durable write.
